response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering fundamentals and recent involvement with MCP and agentic workflows, the resume lacks the required 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions development. The AI/GenAI experience appears to begin in April 2025 (current role), suggesting a recent career transition rather than a seasoned AI systems builder. Critical gaps include no demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or AI evaluation frameworks—all essential for this Staff-level role.
strengths: 19 years of proven software engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation across multiple domains
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated ability to mentor teams and establish engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring culture)
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI solutions—AI work appears to have started in April 2025 (less than 2 months old)
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance optimization, or AI evaluation pipelines
Python not mentioned despite being listed as primary language for this role; AWS experience limited to CDK, no GCP/Azure depth shown

key_factors.factor: Core AI technical stack (vector DB, RAG, LLM optimization)
Strong general engineering and TypeScript foundation
